subcodes.first_line: O servants! The wellsprings of divine bestowal are streaming forth. Quaff ye therefrom, that by the aid of the incomparable Friend
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای بندگان چشمه های بخشش یزدانی در جوش است از آن بنوشید تا بیاری دوست یکتا
subcodes.subjects: @chastisement and requital, @knowledge; recognition of God, @spiritual transformation, @exhortations and counsels, @praise and encouragement, @walking the spiritual path; spiritual wayfaring; the virtuous life, @words vs deeds, @transcending the material condition
